extension.summary: Browse, track, and sync your TV shows and movies with WatchSocial
extension.description: Full WatchSocial integration for Kodi. Browse trending shows, your watchlist, up next episodes, and discover new content — all from within Kodi. Automatically scrobbles watched episodes and movies to your WatchSocial profile with real-time now-playing tracking. Bidirectional sync keeps your Kodi library in sync with WatchSocial.
